name: Msi Pro MP225 (IPS Panel, Res: 1920×1080, 100Hz, 1ms MPRT, 4MS GTG )
highlights: 5″ Full HD IPS monitor designed for productivity and comfort, featuring a 100Hz refresh rate, ultra-fast 1ms response time, and wide 178° viewing angles
With Anti-glare coating, Adaptive Sync support, and dual HDMI & VGA inputs, it’s perfect for PC, Mac, gaming consoles, and mobile devices
Its VESA mount compatibility and energy-efficient design make it ideal for both home and office setups
